messages.content: i currently use zen and love it. would really like to see what ladybird would become
downloaded zen few days ago. lovin it
I just hope it doesn't create a mess like webkit where every app needs to be tested separately to see if it works in webkit
Downloaded zen . Hated it. Deleted immediately
Why is that? I really wanna know why you hated it

So I use linux and I have libreWolf for most things and thorium for when I need to open college account.
Zen looked cool but it couldnt handle whatsapp(16 gb ram I have on my thinkpad) . 
It couldnt show me the markup of the Bajaj CreditX test I was giving , so questions were empty on my browser . So I had to immediately turn on libreWolf bur test got terminated midway. 

Sometimes it glitches my github too. Overall I felt lack of finishing in it and it couldnt handle a lot of data . 
I have 200+ unread on my whatsapp and it lags most browsers but zen completely froze .

After all this I just didnt see the point in zen.

yea, there are some bugs. but its in beta currently. so its fine. 
whenver something doesnt work properly in this, i use that in brave. but i use zen  as default
Yeah… but for me there is no need for zen. I got all my needs covered already so there was no point in having any other browser.

Maybe you don't have acceleration on your pc or you didn't update opencl or your display server try updating them first and I feel that you are on x11 for some reason cuz x11 usually lags cuz it suffers from dynamically sized windows and stuff like transparency that are in zen

I mean I would use Zen no doubt . Its just that I dont see the advantage in it right now. Maybe someone could explain it. I see a lot of my friends using it too. But what is the USP for zen. I cant understand it really .
neither do I. Everything zen does (as far as I know, and I dont know everything) can be done in firefox.
When did you last used it? Its also in beta right now so could be something related to that
This month I tried to give it another shot. But I have been using it sometimes on and off since April . But lets talk about something else. I dont think Zen is interesting enough
